stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What does the TCAS symbol represent?

options.a: Proximate traffic, inside 6 NM and 1200 ft, 800 ft above, descending.
options.b: Proximate traffic, inside 6 NM and 1200 ft, 800 ft above, climbing.
options.c: Proximate traffic, inside 6 NM and 1200 ft, 800 ft below, descending.
options.d: Proximate traffic, inside 6 NM and 1200 ft, 800 ft below, climbing.
